{"schema": "Graph-grounded-Candidate-SFT/v12-hq-final", "sample_uid": "v12_0002965", "task": {"scenario": "research", "goal": "Dear Research Team, You are collaborating to generate a new research idea based on the following Introduction: **Introduction** INTRODUCTION While today’s general-purpose robots are rapidly advanc- ing towards achieving dexterous capabilities comparable to human workers [1], [2], [3], they still face several signifi- cant limitations.
